---
title: ""
---

```{=html}
<div class="page">

  <!-- ── Sidebar ── -->
  <aside class="sidebar reveal">
    <img src="pic1.jpg" alt="Giuseppe Peressotti" class="sidebar-photo">
    <h1 class="sidebar-name">Giuseppe Peressotti</h1>
    <p class="sidebar-subtitle">PhD Candidate in Public Policy &amp; Political Economy</p>
    <p class="sidebar-institution">The University of Texas at Dallas</p>
    <span class="sidebar-market">On the 2026–2027 Job Market</span>

    <div class="sidebar-divider"></div>

    <div class="sidebar-links">
      <a href="mailto:Giuseppe.Peressotti@utdallas.edu">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><rect x="2" y="4" width="20" height="16" rx="2"/><path d="m22 7-8.97 5.7a1.94 1.94 0 0 1-2.06 0L2 7"/></svg>
        Email
      </a>
      <a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=qdYq504AAAAJ&hl=en&oi=ao" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M22 10v6M2 10l10-5 10 5-10 5z"/><path d="M6 12v5c0 2 2 3 6 3s6-1 6-3v-5"/></svg>
        Scholar
      </a>
      <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/giuseppe-peressotti-57b6a614b/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M16 8a6 6 0 0 1 6 6v7h-4v-7a2 2 0 0 0-4 0v7h-4v-7a6 6 0 0 1 6-6z"/><rect x="2" y="9" width="4" height="12"/><circle cx="4" cy="4" r="2"/></svg>
        LinkedIn
      </a>
      <a href="https://bsky.app/profile/gperessotti.bsky.social" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M12 4c3.5 3 7 6.5 7 9.5 0 2.5-1.5 3.5-3 3.5-1.5 0-2.5-1-4-3-1.5 2-2.5 3-4 3-1.5 0-3-1-3-3.5C5 10.5 8.5 7 12 4z"/></svg>
        Bluesky
      </a>
    </div>
  </aside>

  <!-- ── Content ── -->
  <div class="content">

    <!-- About -->
    <section class="section reveal">
      <div class="section-label">About</div>
      <div class="about-text">
        I study trade policy, digital governance, and international institutional design, with a second research program on civil resistance and democratic transitions. My work has been published in the <em>European Journal of International Relations</em> and the <em>Journal of Peace Research</em>.
      </div>
    </section>

    <!-- Research Interests -->
    <section class="section reveal">
      <div class="section-label">Research Interests</div>
      <div class="tags">
        <div class="tag"><span>Digital Trade Governance</span></div>
        <div class="tag"><span>Preferential Trade Agreements</span></div>
        <div class="tag"><span>Network Analysis</span></div>
        <div class="tag"><span>Civil Resistance &amp; Democratization</span></div>
        <div class="tag"><span>Institutional Design</span></div>
      </div>
    </section>

    <!-- Selected Work -->
    <section class="section reveal">
      <div class="section-label">Selected Work</div>
      <div>
        <div class="section-subhead">Published</div>
        <div class="pub">
          <div class="pub-title">Digital Provision Inclusion in Trade Agreements: the Death of (Digital) Distance through a Gravity Model Approach</div>
          <div class="pub-meta"><strong>Peressotti, Giuseppe</strong> (2025). <em>European Journal of International Relations</em>. <span class="pub-status">OnlineFirst</span></div>
        </div>
        <div class="pub">
          <div class="pub-title">Mapping the ROAD to Democracy: A Global Dataset of Overturning Attempts and Organizations in Civil Resistance Transitions</div>
          <div class="pub-meta">Elmore, Naela, Kashmiri Medhi, <strong>Giuseppe Peressotti</strong>, and Jonathan Pinckney (2025). <em>Journal of Peace Research</em>. <span class="pub-status">Forthcoming</span></div>
        </div>

        <div class="section-subhead">Working Papers</div>
        <div class="pub">
          <div class="pub-title">Why Take a Detour: The Choice Between Bilateral and Mega-PTAs</div>
          <div class="pub-meta"><strong>Peressotti, Giuseppe</strong>, Huei-Jyun Ye</div>
        </div>
        <div class="pub">
          <div class="pub-title">The Regionalism of Digital Globalization: a Network Analysis of Digital Provisions as Part of Preferential Trade Agreements</div>
          <div class="pub-meta"><strong>Peressotti, Giuseppe</strong></div>
        </div>
        <div class="pub">
          <div class="pub-title">The Impact of Intellectual Property Provisions as Part of PTAs: Can Institutional Quality be a Driver of Innovation?</div>
          <div class="pub-meta"><strong>Peressotti, Giuseppe</strong></div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </section>

    <!-- Beyond -->
    <section class="section reveal">
      <div class="section-label">Beyond</div>
      <div class="beyond-text">
        When not researching, I enjoy lifting weights, hunting the best coffee shops in the cities I visit, and nerding out on my espresso setup at home.
      </div>
    </section>

  </div>
</div>

<footer>
  <p class="footer-text">&copy; 2026 Giuseppe Peressotti</p>
</footer>
```
